## Pre-merge gating actions

1. **Chamber TH/SV liaison sign-off** on `src/i18n/messages/sv.json` F7 keys (256 entries auto-translated EN→SV; 0 placeholders remain). This is the only outstanding conditional gate from `reviews/review-20260430-225120.md` § S001.

## Post-merge actions (deployment)

In order:

1. Apply DB migrations: `pnpm db:migrate` (0064–0076; journal already synced)
2. Set new env vars on Vercel: `RESEND_BROADCASTS_API_KEY`, `RESEND_BROADCASTS_WEBHOOK_SECRET`, `UNSUBSCRIBE_TOKEN_SECRET`, `BROADCASTS_FROM_EMAIL`
3. Register cron-job.org trigger for `/api/cron/broadcasts/dispatch-scheduled` per `docs/runbooks/cron-jobs.md`
4. Wire pre-prod alerts per `docs/runbooks/broadcasts-dispatch-failure.md` § "Pre-prod alert wiring checklist"
5. Register Resend Broadcasts webhook endpoint at Resend console → `https://swecham.zyncdata.app/api/webhooks/resend-broadcasts`
6. Flip kill-switch: `FEATURE_F7_BROADCASTS=true` on Vercel + redeploy
7. Smoke-test: member compose → submit → admin approve & send-now → verify Resend dashboard shows the broadcast
